# MTGo

> A fast, idiomatic, and feature-complete Go library for the Telegram MTProto API. Full API access, type-safe, zero CGO dependencies, Go 1.22+.

Full API reference is available on [pkg.go.dev](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/mtgo-labs/mtgo), although you SHOULD prefer reading types from LSP instead.

## Table of Contents

### Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://mtgo.dev/guide/quick-start)
- [Installation](https://mtgo.dev/guide/installation)
- [Client](https://mtgo.dev/guide/client)
- [Authentication](https://mtgo.dev/guide/authentication)

### Handlers & Filters

- [Handlers](https://mtgo.dev/guide/handlers)
- [Filters](https://mtgo.dev/guide/filters)
- [Context](https://mtgo.dev/guide/context)

### API Reference

- [Client](https://mtgo.dev/api/client)
- [Config](https://mtgo.dev/api/config)
- [Context Methods](https://mtgo.dev/api/context)
- [Messages](https://mtgo.dev/api/messages)
- [Bound Methods](https://mtgo.dev/api/bound)
- [Bound Chat](https://mtgo.dev/api/bound-chat)
- [Media](https://mtgo.dev/api/media)
- [Users & Chats](https://mtgo.dev/api/users)
- [Auth](https://mtgo.dev/api/auth)
- [Storage](https://mtgo.dev/api/storage)
- [Filters](https://mtgo.dev/api/filters)
- [Types](https://mtgo.dev/api/types)
- [Errors](https://mtgo.dev/api/tgerr)
- [Raw TL Types](https://mtgo.dev/api/tg)

### Advanced

- [File Transfer](https://mtgo.dev/advanced/file-transfer)
- [Peer Resolution](https://mtgo.dev/advanced/peer-resolution)
- [Session Management](https://mtgo.dev/advanced/session-management)
- [Transport](https://mtgo.dev/advanced/transport)
- [WebSocket Transport](https://mtgo.dev/advanced/websocket)
- [Custom Storage](https://mtgo.dev/advanced/custom-storage)

### Plugins

- [Plugin Interface](https://mtgo.dev/plugins/plugin-interface)
- [Conversations](https://mtgo.dev/plugins/conversations)
- [i18n](https://mtgo.dev/plugins/i18n)
- [Middlewares](https://mtgo.dev/plugins/middlewares)
- [Plugin Template](https://mtgo.dev/plugins/template)
- [Middleware Template](https://mtgo.dev/plugins/middleware-template)

### Examples

- [Command Handler](https://mtgo.dev/examples/command-handler)
- [File Upload](https://mtgo.dev/examples/file-upload)
- [Inline Mode](https://mtgo.dev/examples/inline-mode)
